---
title: "Major Robert Woollcombe RMA"
---

## Major Robert Woollcombe RMA

**Dates:** (1835-1920)

### Description

brother-in-law of Gertrude Walter

### Biography

He married (1871) Mary Walter, whose sister Frances was married to CMY\'s brother JBY, and whose sister Gertrude Walter lived with CMY.  He came from a gentry family settled near Puslinch and his brother was married to Anne Catharina Pode, who was a cousin, niece of WCY.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from May 3d [1897]
- Letter from Novr 19th 1891
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
